title: Coins RPG
description: Introduces collectible coins that drop from various in-game sources.
body:
---

**Werbung / Advertising**

[![G-Portal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1289491/description_c20354d2-3447-46e1-a17d-6f502cee8d3f.jpg)](https://www.g-portal.com/?ref=sparkitv)

[![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/eH38TdA)
[![PayPal](https://img.shields.io/badge/PayPal-sparkitv-blue?logo=paypal&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.paypal.me/sparkitv)

---

This mod – like some others – adds various coins to Minecraft.  
**Coins RPG** currently includes **9 different coin types**, which can mostly be found in chests or rarely dropped by mobs.

![Coin Types](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1289491/description_c41e3631-3fcf-4e10-b013-264aab5dc4ab.png)

There’s also a **Coin Trade** system that lets you upgrade lower-tier coins into higher-tier ones – start small and work your way up!

### 🔧 Config Options:

![Config Options](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1289491/description_ceafc7c7-e29b-435e-a6d8-e6d0c8dcd296.png)

Use the coins to **trade with other players**, or to **express other things** – like rewards or collectibles.  
In the future, there will be **even more ways to use and spend them**!

Over time, I plan to add new features **directly to this mod**, and also release **additional mods** that expand Coins RPG with more mechanics and content.

Since I’m currently working on everything alone, **development will take time**, but I’m doing my best.  
I truly appreciate any form of **feedback, support, or collaboration**.

**Thanks for playing – and enjoy Coins RPG!** 💰

---

**Known incompatibility:**  
"replacedEmeralds" from Coins RPG doesn't work when Dynamic Villager Trades is installed.  

Big thanks to [Vincentmet](https://www.curseforge.com/members/vincentmet/projects) for the help with my problems with the GUI.

Check out my other mods: [SparkiTV](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sparkitv/projects)

---
